g.text: 3D Data Quality Framework \u2014 Anomaly Detection Engine (D1)
Execution Pipeline \u00b7 5D Dimensions \u00b7 Drift Detection \u00b7 Delta Metadata Cache
Load baselines for drift + volume checks
[2] Delta Metadata Cache (per unique table, built once per job run)
Metadata cache (keyed by catalog.schema.table, TTL = this run):
DESCRIBE DETAIL, DESCRIBE HISTORY LIMIT 50, SHOW PARTITIONS,
INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS -- built once per unique table per run.
Build metadata cache for all unique tables
Lineage-aware fanout \u2014 parent tables before children.
Check Dispatcher routes each config to the correct
execution strategy based on check_dimension + check_type.
VIOLATION if |z_score| > threshold OR drop_pct > max_drop_pct
Escalate to Tech Lead + Data Governance
After every run: update rolling baselines in table_daily_metrics
so next run has fresh Z-score and PSI reference points.
Baselines use EWMA (Exponentially Weighted Moving Average):
stddev updated with Welford online algorithm.
PSI baseline = last stable distribution snapshot (last PASS date).
ORDER BY severity DESC, detected_at ASC
D2 runs independently; Job does not wait.
